case_title: GONZALO ROJAS VS. PAN AMERICAN VOYAGES LLC,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROJAS, GONZALO AS TO DEFENDANT PAN AMERICAN VOYAGES LLC, A NEW YORK LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROJAS, GONZALO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAN AMERICAN VOYAGES LLC, A NEW YORK LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $32,640.84 PRINCIPAL, $112.24 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $33,203.08, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
